title: nuphar ovata
intro: Nuphar ovata, also known as the American white water lily or spatterdock, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nuphar ovata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting liver function and digestion. Herbal preparations of Nuphar ovata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
